text: 23. GUARANTY: Subcontractor shall, before requesting final payment, provide any and all guaranties and warranties required by the Subcontract Documents. In addition to any specific guaranty required by the Subcontract Documents, Subcontractor, in signing this  subcontract,  agrees  at  his  own  expense  to  replace  or  repair  any  faulty  or  defective  or  non-conforming  material  or workmanship within ONE (1) YEAR from the date of substantial completion of the Project, or Owner's beneficial occupancy, whichever occurs later or such longer period, if stated in the Prime Contract. In addition, Subcontractor shall be responsible and pay  for  replacement  or  repair  of  adjacent  materials  or  work  or  property  which  may  be  damaged  due  to  the  failure  of Subcontractor's material or work and/or damaged as a result of the replacement or repairs thereof. This correction period shall apply solely to Subcontractor's duty to repair or replace any faulty or defective or non-conforming material or workmanship and shall not be construed as a period of limitation with respect to Contractor's other rights and remedies arising out of or related to this Subcontract.
